team_name: Sentinel-Procure: An Automated Multimodal AI Framework for Explainable Tender Eligibility & Compliance Analysis
summary: Design an AI-based platform for tender evaluation and eligibility analysis in government procurement. The platform uses multimodal AI, intelligent tender deconstruction, bidder synthesis, and explainable AI decision engine for accurate and transparent evaluations.
optimization_claims: Reduces the evaluation cycle from days to minutes
constraints_addressed: Addresses low-quality scans and ambiguous legal phrasing
